_comment: Railway native cron schedule. Create these as separate cron services in Railway, each hitting the main web service URL with the X-Cron-Secret header.

crons.name: check-orders
crons.description: Poll Etsy for new orders every 10 minutes

crons.name: conversations
crons.description: Poll Etsy conversations for new messages every 10 minutes

crons.name: daily-stats
crons.description: Collect daily marketing stats at 11 PM UTC

crons.name: daily-orders
crons.description: Sync orders and calculate financials at 10 PM UTC

crons.name: morning-digest
crons.description: Morning digest at 8 AM IST (1 PM UTC)

crons.name: weekly-roas
crons.description: Weekly ROAS report Mondays at 9 AM IST (2 PM UTC)

crons.name: weekly-finance
crons.description: Weekly finance summary Mondays at 9 AM IST (2 PM UTC)

crons.name: weekly-rollup
crons.description: Weekly rollup to Slack Mondays at 9 AM IST (2 PM UTC)

crons.name: sync-meta-catalog
crons.description: Sync product catalog to Meta Commerce Manager at 5 AM ET (9 AM UTC)

crons.name: sync-ad-spend
crons.description: Pull yesterday's ad spend from Meta + Google at 6 AM ET (10 AM UTC)

crons.name: sync-google-merchant
crons.description: Sync product catalog to Google Merchant Center at 5:15 AM ET (9:15 AM UTC)
